MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN DRUMMOND'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE DESIGNEE FOR DEPOSITION WITH DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THE COURT DEFINED THE SCHEDULE OF THE J CHURCH LINE WHICH BEGINS ON FRIDAY NIGHT AND END ON SATURDAY MORNING TO BE FROM 7:00 P.M. TO 6 A.M. QUESTION REGARDING A QUERY ON THE PERSON'S PERFORMANCE ON THE PRECEEDING FRIDAY NIGHTS WAS ALSO ALLOWED BY THE COURT INCLUDING REPOSE AND DWELL TIMES OF THE J-CHURCH LINE ON 3 WEEKENDS. THE COURT REQUIRES DOCUMENTS TO BE PRODUCED ON THE VARIOUS AREAS WHERE THE COURT ALLOWED THE QUESTIONS. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 1118 =(HK/302)

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Designee For Deposition With Documents.
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARNOLD I. BERSCHLER, TEL. NO. 1-800-338-1441 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. HUNTER W. SIMS III, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4259 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN DRUMMOND's Motion To Compel Defendant To Produce Designee For Deposition With Documents is granted.
The court defined the schedule of the J Church Line which begins on Friday night and end on Saturday Morning to be from 7:00 p.m. to 6 a.m. Question regarding a query on the person's performance on the preceding Friday nights was also allowed by the court including repose and dwell times of the J-Church line on 3 weekends. The court requires documents to be produced on the various areas where the court allowed the questions. Parties to meet and confer as to form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 1118 =(HK/302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Set For Trial On May-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
